div.head: 93. Memorandum From Ronald Lehman of the National Security Council Staff to the President’s Assistant for National Security Affairs (McFarlane)Source: Reagan Library, Intelligence Files, System II files—INT 8490035–88902478. Secret; Sensitive. Eyes Only. Sent for information. 2 pages not declassified.
div.p: [Source: Reagan Library, Intelligence Files, System II files—INT 8490035–88902478. Secret; Sensitive. Eyes Only. Sent for information. 2 pages not declassified.]
